predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold (excluding VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three size criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: ceases_to_exceed_more_than_one_criterion_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company no longer exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: is_kleine_vennootschap
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a kleine vennootschap (small company) as of the given financial year.

predicates.name: loses_kleine_vennootschap_status_from
predicates.description: The company loses kleine vennootschap status starting from this financial year, because more than one criterion was exceeded for two consecutive years ending in the preceding year.

predicates.name: gains_kleine_vennootschap_status_from
predicates.description: The company gains kleine vennootschap status starting from this financial year, because more than one criterion ceased to be exceeded for two consecutive years ending in the preceding year.

predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is the immediately preceding financial year of the first.

predicates.name: next_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is the immediately following financial year of the first.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding VAT of the company in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.
